description: Index of minimal repro fixtures. See README.md for schema and lifecycle.

specs.partial_formula: overhead_pt = top + bot + (rows-1)*ih  (fits 9/10 variants; multi-row+ih has unexplained +0.5pt residual)
blocked_on: Resolve multi-row insideH +0.5pt residual via more variants (5/10/20 rows, varied ih widths)
specs.notes: Re-derive row_height = f(content, padding, top, bot, ih, num_rows, sz). EXCEPTION stacking forbidden — fix the spec, not per-doc. 1-row case is clean and explains the 683f -1.0pt gap exactly, but partial implementation forbidden until multi-row resolved.
